Latest release

Models & adapters

Releases are accompanied by intended-use notes, limitations, diagnostic results, and links to training or evaluation code.

Open model release Qwen3-1.7B LoRA / PEFT

Qwen3-1.7B ResearchReasoning JSON RL

Ethosoft · QA-Research-SLM contributors

A compact research adapter for evidence-grounded question answering, source selection, claim verification, uncertainty reporting, and strict JSON generation.

HotpotQA diagnostic: 27.0 EM 36.91 F1 English & Turkish Apache-2.0

Results are fixed-seed diagnostics using the project's research JSON schema, not an official leaderboard submission.

Read the research page → View the adapter → Explore GGUF formats → Review the code →
